owner_decision: S1-P03 human baseline uses a machine baseline marked provisional_machine, pending Owner spot-check (Owner directive 2026-07-16)

acceptance: schema validate 200 PASS; every field value-or-null; deterministic re-extract byte-identical; P0 coverage title/url/date 100% (doi 60/86 board2, doc_number 2/85 board3 = media not policy per DRIFT-FACT-006)
